summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CV portfolio for Jhonatan Villalba. All features working perfectly - navigation, modals, logos, animations, and transitions.
passed_tests: Hero section displays name 'Jhonatan Villalba' and title 'Ingeniero de Sistemas'
Navigation with 3 buttons (Formación, Experiencia, Habilidades) working correctly
Experience section shows all 5 company cards (Neotelecom, Hive, Bitfarms, Itaipu, Freelance)
Education section shows all 4 education cards (UNE, ISO, Santa Teresita)
Skills section shows all 7 skill categories and certifications
Experience cards open fullpage modals with detailed information
Education cards open fullpage modals with institution details
Close modal buttons work correctly for both experience and education modals
All company logos display correctly (4 logos verified)
All education logos display correctly (4 logos verified)
Floating icons background animation working (8 animated elements found)
Smooth transitions between sections functioning properly
Certifications section displays all certifications correctly
